title: Precedence Resolution Result
description: Platform-level schema for a rule precedence resolution result within the PDP Decision Envelope. See docs/precedence-resolution.md for full semantics and default priority hierarchy.

evaluated_rules.description: List of rule identifiers that were evaluated.

winning_rule.description: Identifier of the rule that won precedence.

resolution_strategy.description: Description of the precedence resolution strategy used (e.g. 'project-local override', 'most-specific-match', 'explicit-priority').

adoption_layer.description: The adoption layer where the winning rule originates.
